ca~tl~·on
i.e. Anything that afflicts Dasamsalord (here Mo) should
afflict the Job as well, and that is why the Mo-Ra combination
is becomming very much troublesome period especially
connected to job. To add to it Ra Dasamsa also falls in an
enemy sign. All this says that Mo-Ra period won't be good
concerning especially Job.
All these evidences also helps us in coming to the
conclusion that BT = Sh 27' 02" AM
Thus Ifix the BT=5h 27" 02" AM and I suggest you to use
the year length 360 savana days in Vimsothari dasa
calculations.
Next part :Step 4 -A brieflife analysis - Past/Future.
The astrologer should do this based on his knowledge and
experience on astrological prediction and life event analysis
based on dasas such as vimsottari. This won't be discussed
here in this book.
This four step process is essential to any sincere BT
rectification energize. If anyone avoids this long path, it
simply means that he is not sincere to the task he is undertaking
and so the subject itself.
